headline: Culinary Team Building in the Parkland office Yesterday we all enjoyed a Tartar ...
quote: Culinary Team Building in the Parkland office Yesterday we all enjoyed a Tartar echpochmak night when we cooked, laughed, and ate all together after a big work day! Huge thank you to for dreaming this up, for making it happen so seamlessly, and for keeping the energy high with the perfect playlist S
author: Oxana Drake

title: From #general
headline: Happy Monday, everyone! This past Saturday, our Parkland office took part in the...
quote: Happy Monday, everyone! This past Saturday, our Parkland office took part in the Greatest American Cleanup event and spent the morning cleaning up Red Reef Park beach. It was a beautiful day by the ocean, and getting to do something meaningful together, with family in tow , made it even more special
author: Oxana Drake
